prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: A handsome young man named Fang Yichen standing in the center with full-body view, featuring extremely attractive and delicate facial features with clear pale skin and outstanding temperament. He has a refined scholarly face with deep, penetrating eyes that show sharp intelligence, slightly pale complexion suggesting hardship, and a lean physique that reflects the harsh times. His expression is calm and contemplative, embodying the quiet dignity of an educated person. He wears a traditional blue-green long robe (qingse changshan) in Ming Dynasty style, with flowing fabric that suggests both elegance and practicality for travel. His hair is styled in traditional Ming Dynasty fashion with a scholarly topknot. His posture is upright yet humble, hands positioned naturally, conveying both intellectual confidence and the cautious awareness of someone navigating dangerous times. The overall appearance combines exceptional handsomeness with the weathered wisdom of someone who has witnessed great suffering, perfectly embodying a brilliant detective-scholar in famine-stricken late Ming China.

Traditional Chinese ink wash painting style, black white and gray tones, profound artistic conception, full-body character design, pure white background, character centered standing, no text, no symbols, no words., very handsome, very beautiful, stunning, delicate features, symmetrical face, clear skin, attractive, full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: ink_painting
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
